context: Tests whether the agent catches TipKit reusable identity, style configuration, action, event, and invalidation mistakes.

checklist.name: Reusable identity
checklist.description: Says a reusable tip should override `id` with a stable content-derived identifier rather than using the default type-name ID for every instance.

checklist.name: Style configuration
checklist.description: Uses `TipViewStyle.Configuration` values such as image, title, message, actions, and tip instead of rendering from a captured concrete tip instance.

checklist.name: Action rendering
checklist.description: Calls `action.label()` and invokes the action handler correctly inside custom style buttons.

checklist.name: Event payloads
checklist.description: Keeps `Tips.Event<DonationInfo>` payloads small and `Codable`/`Sendable`, or uses no payload when counts are enough, rather than storing large app models.

checklist.name: Invalidation
checklist.description: Invalidates the specific tip with an appropriate reason when the user performs the discovered action or explicitly closes the tip.

checklist.name: Scope control
checklist.description: Avoids unrelated SwiftUI layout, navigation, or branding advice that does not address the TipKit plan.
